violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained needs routine cleaning. Pop gun drains behind bar noted in need of routine cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present west-end ladies restroom. (fan not working)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling fan in west-end ladies restroom noted in need of cleaning. One ceiling tile noted missing in west-end mens restroom needs install.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained needs routine cleaning. Discontinue storing beverages in ice that is used for drinks. Pop gun drains behind bar need routine cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in west-end womens restroom. Fan not working.
PREMISES (1 pts): Damp mop noted not hung to air dry.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single-service products noted being stored on floor in back dry-storage room.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling fans in west-end restrooms need cleaning. One ceiling tile in womens restroom noted missing needs install. Floor in back dry-storage room noted in need of repair.
